tasks.build:epub: cd epub-source && rm -f ../monte-criston-kreivi.epub && zip -X0 ../monte-criston-kreivi.epub mimetype && zip -Xr9D ../monte-criston-kreivi.epub META-INF OEBPS
tasks.check:generated-converter: deno fmt --check deno.json scripts/convert-generated.ts && deno lint scripts/convert-generated.ts && deno check scripts/convert-generated.ts
